title: Coherent Errors: Systematic Rotations and Control Imperfections
description: Understand coherent errors arising from miscalibrated gates, systematic rotations, and control imperfections, and learn how they differ from stochastic noise.
learningObjectives: Distinguish coherent errors from incoherent noise
Model systematic rotation errors in quantum gates
Analyze the impact of coherent errors on quantum circuits
Understand error accumulation in coherent vs incoherent regimes
Apply randomized compiling to convert coherent to incoherent errors
